title: Spurious Yosys warning when building a Gowin project
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.61+56 (git sha1 f5ea73eb9-dirty, aarch64-apple-darwin23.5-clang++ 18.1.8 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

NOTE: This is a regression, and I got it only when upgrading to the latest Yosys.

[work-gowin-warning.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24839371/work-gowin-warning.zip)

1. Unzip the project

2. Run `yosys -p "synth_gowin -top blinky -json /tmp/_yosys_output.json" -q blinky.v`

### Expected Behavior

Expecting successful completion with no warnings.

### Actual Behavior

Yosys emits a spurious warning: `Warning: define gw1n not used in the library.`.

```
$ ./run.sh
+ yosys --version
Yosys 0.61+56 (git sha1 f5ea73eb9-dirty, aarch64-apple-darwin23.5-clang++ 18.1.8 -fPIC -O3)
+ yosys -p 'synth_gowin -top blinky -json /tmp/_yosys_output.json' -q blinky.v
Warning: define gw1n not used in the library.
```
code_blocks:
$ ./run.sh
+ yosys --version
Yosys 0.61+56 (git sha1 f5ea73eb9-dirty, aarch64-apple-darwin23.5-clang++ 18.1.8 -fPIC -O3)
+ yosys -p 'synth_gowin -top blinky -json /tmp/_yosys_output.json' -q blinky.v
Warning: define gw1n not used in the library.
